facebook.caption:
4.7 stars. 750 reviews. And most tourists walk straight past it.

Tween's Kitchen on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is the kind of Vietnamese restaurant that locals keep quietly rating five stars while the resort crowds queue elsewhere. Solid $15-30 per person. Real food, real flavors, real Phu Quoc.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the plates land at Tween's Kitchen and you'll understand the 750 reviews. Vietnamese food done right on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. Budget $15-30 and come hungry.
